service_credits_summary: Uptime / availability: minimum 99.5% per calendar month, excluding scheduled downtime (48 hrs advance notice) and force majeure. Service credit if below: if Services unavailable >0.5% of any calendar month, Shipsy provides a Service credit equal to 5% of that month's subscription fee.

SERVICE CREDITS: if Shipsy fails the 99.99% SLA, credit a "Daily Fee" (= 0.274% of annual Fee) for each Reporting Day (or portion) missed ("Service Level Credit"). Credit may be refund or applied to next invoice at Customer's discretion. Termination right: if SLA missed >=5 Reporting Days in any calendar month, or >=15 Reporting Days in any 6-month period, Customer may terminate and Shipsy refunds prepaid unused fees + pays unused credits.
Service credits for support-SLA breach: none.
